/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection         -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -Wp,-D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -g -ffile-prefix-map=/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/unity-base/unity-api/src=/usr/src/debug/unity-api -flto=auto -fvisibility=hidden -std=c++11 -pedantic -Wall -Wextra -fno-permissive -Wsuggest-override -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,-z,defs -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/unity-api.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libunity-api.so.0 -o libunity-api.so.0.1 "CMakeFiles/unity-api-obj.dir/unity/api/Version.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/unity-api-obj.dir/unity/util/internal/DaemonImpl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/unity-api-obj.dir/unity/util/Daemon.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/unity-api-obj.dir/unity/util/FileIO.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/unity-api-obj.dir/unity/util/IniParser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/unity-api-obj.dir/unity/util/SnapPath.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/unity-api-obj.dir/unity/Exception.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/unity-api-obj.dir/unity/UnityExceptions.cpp.o"  -L/usr/lib -lglib-2.0
